name: TCIL_ActivateDiagnosticsSupport
title: TCIL_ActivateDiagnosticsSupport
syntax: long TCIL_ActivateDiagnosticsSupport(dbNode node, byte enable); // form 2
description: This function activates or deactivates the support of ISO11783 diagnostics by the IL.
If diagnostics support is activated the node:
If diagnostics support is activated then diagnostics message which are in the Tx list of the node are disabled and therefor not used by the IL.

parameters.name: enable
parameters.description: Enables or disables support of ISO11783 diagnostics: 0: Disable support of ISO11783 diagnostics 1: Enable support of ISO11783 diagnostics

parameters.name: node
parameters.description: Simulation node to apply the function.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
